title: Sorting information in a dashboard
excerpt: I would like to be able to sort by particular columns on a table widget in a dashboard the same way I can on the original board. Alternatively if I can select a saved view from the original board that has a sort filter i…

posts.author: kaleighD (Kaleigh Dingman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to sort by particular columns on a table widget in a dashboard the same way I can on the original board. Alternatively if I can select a saved view from the original board that has a sort filter in place instead of being forced to use the main view.

I have seen this topic has been brought up several times with lots of responses but it has not been addressed. Clearly it is a needed function so I am going to restart the request to bump it up. Please vote! You should be able to sort dashboard information in some way!
